ops.insert: Snack Line Shuffle — Question Audit Results
SLS-R0 · Warm-up · 2 kids · [2+1, 1+1] → order: a→b (3,2) · M1: NO

attributes.@slsf3: Expressions, totals, correctOrder all match spec. amberLine 'Hmm, are we in the right order?' — direction-free, no totals, no >/< relation. PASS.

ops.insert: SLS-R1 · Warm-up · 2 kids · [3+1, 1+2] → order: a→b (4,3) · M1: NO

attributes.@slsf3: Expressions, totals, correctOrder match spec. amberLine 'I'm not sure I'm in the right spot.' — compliant. PASS.
Correct ordering c(5)→b(3)→a(2) matches spec. First addends (1,2,3) align with totals — no trap, pedagogical purpose confirmed. amberLine 'Do you think I belong here?' — compliant.
M1 trap verified: 3+0 has bigger first addend (3) than 2+2 (2) but 3+0=3 < 2+2=4. Correct order c(5)→b(4)→a(3). amberLine 'Um… I think someone might be out of place.' — compliant, no direction hint.
M1 trap verified: 4+0 (first addend 4) has smaller total (4) than 3+2 (total 5). Correct leader is b=3+2. amberLine 'Are you sure about this spot?' — compliant.

ops.insert: SLS-R5 · 3-kid clean · [1+0, 2+0, 1+3] → order: c→b→a (4,2,1) · M1: NO

attributes.@slsf3: Clean round. c=1+3=4 leads. Reinforces that second addend determines total when first addend is small. amberLine 'Hmm, I'm not sure this is right.' — compliant.
M1 trap verified: same structure as R4 but third kid differs (1+1=2 vs 2+1=3). 4+0 loses to 3+2 at top. amberLine 'Wait — should I be here?' — compliant.

ops.insert: SLS-R7 · 3-kid clean · [0+2, 1+3, 0+3] → order: b→c→a (4,3,2) · M1: NO

attributes.@slsf3: Clean. Two kids share 0 first addend (0+2 and 0+3) — first-addend heuristic useless for them. Full computation required. amberLine 'Something feels off about this order.' — compliant.
M1 trap verified: 3+0 bigger first addend (3) than 2+3 (2) but 3+0=3 < 2+3=5. amberLine 'I don't think this neighbour and I are in the right order.' — compliant.
First 4-kid round. Perfectly consecutive totals 2,3,4,5. No trap — establishes 4-way ordering before adding complexity. amberLine 'Hmm, are we lined up the right way?' — compliant.

DATA: correctOrder c→a→b→d matches spec (2+3=5 leads). Double M1 trap verified. AMBER VIOLATION FOUND: old amberLine 'I think someone nearby has more snacks than me' implied a directional comparison (who has more/less) — banned by the permanent Visual Neutrality Constraint ('no >/< relation, no explicit who-goes-first'). Classified HIGH severity.
attributes.@slsf4: FIXED 2026-04-09: Replaced amberLine with 'Hmm, I'm not sure we've all been counted up properly.' — direction-free, prompts recomputation only. Fix note displayed in Level Browser.

attributes.@slsf3: M1 trap: 4+0 bigger first addend (4) than 3+2 (3) but 4+0=4 < 3+2=5. Three X+0 kids have trivial totals; challenge is entirely at top pair. correctOrder a→b→c→d verified. amberLine 'Wait — check our snack counts again!' — compliant (encourages recomputation).

All four kids have 0 first addend — first-addend heuristic is completely useless. Player must read second addend for every kid. Presented order scrambles the rank. correctOrder c(4)→d(3)→b(2)→a(1) verified. amberLine 'Are we in the right spots?' — compliant.

M1 trap: 4+0 bigger first addend (4) than 3+2 (3), yet 4+0=4 < 3+2=5. Top pair reversed by M1 heuristic. Totals 5,4,3,1 — clean finale, uneven bottom gap. correctOrder a→b→c→d verified. amberLine 'Something's off — I'm not sure this is right.' — compliant.

ops.insert: CC-1 · Amber trigger — transition-only compliance · FIXED

attributes.@slsf3: Spec requires: 'Do not play VO if the pair was already amber — transition only.' Original handleReorder fired on any drag where amber pairs existed AND no toast was currently shown. After toast dismissed, any subsequent drag with same amber pairs would re-fire — not true transition-only. Classified MEDIUM.
attributes.@slsf4: FIXED 2026-04-09: Rewrote handleReorder to track prevAmberPairsRef (Set of pair keys from previous drag). Toast fires only if at least one amber pair key is NEW vs previous drag. prevAmberPairsRef reset to empty Set in startRound() on each new round.

ops.insert: CC-2 · Visual neutrality — totals never displayed · PASS

attributes.@slsf3: Audited all UI states: DraggableKidCard renders kid.expression only (e.g. '2+1'), never kid.total. Served state (celebration) shows expressions only. Level Browser has reveal-total toggle gated as 'internal reference' — acceptable for design tooling, not player-facing. Fairness language audit: idle screen copy and rule reminder are computation-framed, no fairness/friendship language.

ops.insert: Data correctness: 14/14 PASS — all expressions, totals, correctOrder match spec exactly
M1 trap count: 7/14 (50%) — R3, R4, R6, R8, R10, R11, R13. Spec requires ≥30%. PASS.
Amber VO copy: 13/14 PASS, 1 FIXED (R10 — HIGH). Visual Neutrality Constraint violation patched.
Cross-cutting: 2 issues — CC-1 amber trigger FIXED (MEDIUM), CC-2 visual neutrality PASS
Overall: 0 FAIL · 0 WARN · 2 FIXED (HIGH + MEDIUM) · 14 PASS · Cold-start readiness: GOOD
